A '''battle''' at [[Basilisk]] was one of several taking place between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Victory Fleet]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist's]] [[Bulwark Fleet]]. The battle was inconclusive as the Bulwark Fleet remained a threat, forcing the Victory Fleet to pursue it further.

{{Battle-stub}}
